parsedJson.summary: The site shows the business name and contact icons clearly, but the heavy dark styling, weak trust proof, and unclear mobile actions make it feel older than a current Brisbane roofing business.

issues.title: Heavy dark background feels dated
issues.what_observed: Both screenshots use a black roof-tile texture behind the header and content, with white text sitting directly on the dark image.
issues.why_problem: A Google-searching local customer may read the dark textured layout as old or low-budget, especially when comparing roofers side by side. It makes the business feel less current even if the work is legitimate.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A light, clean page background with dark readable text, one strong orange accent color, and real project photography used in framed sections rather than as a repeated texture.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the black texture background with a white or very light grey layout, keep orange for primary actions, and use roof photos only as hero or gallery images.
issues.plain_explanation: 现在页面大面积黑色屋顶纹理，看起来像很多年前的网站模板，不像一家正在活跃接单的本地公司。
issues.customer_impact: 客户从 Google 点进来后通常几秒内判断靠不靠谱。视觉显旧会让一部分人直接返回搜索结果，去点看起来更新、更专业的竞争对手。

issues.title: Mobile phone number is hidden
issues.what_observed: On mobile, the top area shows a round orange phone icon but no visible phone number next to it.
issues.why_problem: Many local roofing customers want to call quickly, especially for leaks or urgent repairs. If they cannot see the number immediately, some will hesitate or tap back to another roofer.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A sticky mobile header with a visible phone number or a full-width 'Call 0432 254 975' button that stays easy to tap.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a persistent mobile call bar showing 'Call 0432 254 975' with the phone icon, and keep it visible at the top or bottom of the screen.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机页面只有电话图标，没有直接显示电话号码，客户要先猜这个按钮能不能打电话。
issues.customer_impact: 本地服务客户很多是在手机上找人，约70%的本地搜索会发生在移动端。电话不够明显，会减少马上来电的机会，尤其是漏水这类急单。

issues.title: No clear quote action above fold
issues.what_observed: The desktop header shows a phone number and two round icons, but there is no visible 'Get a Quote' or 'Request Inspection' button in the first screen.
issues.why_problem: Not every visitor is ready to call. A Brisbane homeowner comparing roofers may prefer to request a quote quietly, and the page does not give them an obvious next step.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A prominent orange button reading 'Get a Free Roof Quote' beside the phone number on desktop and below the hero headline on mobile.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a primary CTA button above the fold: 'Get a Free Roof Quote', linking to a short contact form, with phone as the secondary action.
issues.plain_explanation: 页面顶部没有清楚的“获取报价”按钮，只能打电话或点图标。
issues.customer_impact: 有些客户上班或晚上看网站，不方便马上打电话。没有报价入口，会让这些潜在客户流失到提供表单报价的同行那里。

issues.title: Trust proof is not visible
issues.what_observed: The visible first screen shows the logo, phone, menu, hero image, and text, but no Google rating, review count, licence, insurance, warranty, or local suburb proof.
issues.why_problem: Roof restoration is a high-trust purchase. A homeowner searching 'roofer Brisbane' wants quick proof that the business is real, reviewed, insured, and local before contacting them.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Above-fold trust row with Google star rating, '13+ years experience', licence/insured badge, service area, and a workmanship warranty statement.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Place a compact trust strip under the hero or header with review rating, years in business, Brisbane service area, warranty, and licence/insurance details.
issues.plain_explanation: 首屏没有看到评分、评价数量、执照、保险、质保这些能让客户放心的信息。
issues.customer_impact: 修屋顶金额高、风险高，客户会更谨慎。缺少信任证明会让他们不敢提交信息或打电话，特别是从 Google 商家资料第一次进来的陌生客户。

issues.title: Navigation feels sparse
issues.what_observed: The desktop orange navigation bar contains only 'About', 'Gallery', and 'Contact' spread widely across the full page.
issues.why_problem: A visitor looking for roof repairs, roof painting, tile replacement, or restoration details cannot immediately see whether the business handles their exact job.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A concise service-led navigation with 'Roof Restoration', 'Roof Repairs', 'Roof Painting', 'Gallery', and 'Contact' plus a quote button.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the broad three-item nav with service-specific links and a right-aligned quote CTA on desktop.
issues.plain_explanation: 导航只有三个很空的栏目，没有直接列出客户最关心的屋顶服务。
issues.customer_impact: 客户如果看不到自己需要的服务，会以为你不做这项工作。这样会减少继续浏览和询价的机会。

issues.title: Mobile has an empty orange strip
issues.what_observed: On mobile, a solid orange horizontal bar appears below the three round header icons with no text or visible purpose.
issues.why_problem: An empty colored strip takes valuable mobile space and creates confusion. Local customers on phones need every top-screen element to help them act quickly.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: That space should either be removed or turned into a meaningful call-to-action bar such as 'Free Brisbane Roof Quote'.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Convert the empty orange strip into a tappable CTA bar or remove it and move the hero content higher.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机顶部有一条橙色横条，但没有文字，看起来像空白或未完成的设计。
issues.customer_impact: 手机屏幕空间很宝贵。无用元素占掉首屏，会把真正能带来电话和询价的信息往下挤。

issues.title: Hero image lacks a selling message
issues.what_observed: The main house photo appears as a wide image with no overlaid headline, service promise, suburb relevance, or call button.
issues.why_problem: The image shows a nice roof, but it does not immediately tell a new visitor why this roofer is the right choice or what to do next.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero section with a real roof restoration image, headline like 'Brisbane Roof Restoration & Repairs', a short trust line, and call/quote buttons visible on top or directly below.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Rebuild the hero with a service-specific headline, Brisbane location cue, Google rating or warranty proof, and two actions: call and request quote.
issues.plain_explanation: 首图只是展示房子，没有告诉客户你具体做什么、为什么值得信任、下一步该点哪里。
issues.customer_impact: 访客进入页面后需要马上确认“这家公司能解决我的问题”。信息不够直接，会增加离开的概率，减少来自 Google 流量的询盘。

positive_observations: The business name and logo are clearly visible in both desktop and mobile screenshots.
The orange accent color is memorable and can be reused for calls to action.
The visible phone number on desktop is easy to find in the header.
redesign_priorities: 1. Add a visible mobile call bar and desktop/mobile quote CTA above the fold.
2. Replace the dark textured layout with a lighter, more professional service-business design.
3. Add above-fold trust proof: Google rating, warranty, licence/insurance, and Brisbane service area.
